  • Method Details

    • createDefaultRegistry

      @Internal static DynamicRegistry<SulfurCubeArchetype> createDefaultRegistry(Registries registries)
      Creates a new instance of the "minecraft:sulfur_cube_archetype" registry containing the vanilla contents.
      See Also:
      • to get an existing instance of the registry

    • create
